questions.question: Describe the difference between a primary key and a foreign key in a database. Provide an example of each. (Ch 7.2)
questions.hint: Explain the role of primary keys and foreign keys in maintaining data integrity and relationships between tables.

questions.question: What is normalization and why is it performed in database design? (Ch 7.1)
questions.hint: Define normalization and explain its importance in preventing data redundancy, improving data consistency, and enhancing data scalability.

questions.question: What are the benefits of using a relational database management system (RDBMS) over a flat file database? (Ch 7.3)
questions.hint: Discuss the advantages of RDBMS, including improved data security, increased data integrity, and enhanced data management capabilities.
